pages.raw_text:
The boycott will be enforced by
appealing to the contractors not to
buy material of the unfair mills. If
the contractors persist in buying of
these mills. then the millworkers
must deal with them. This may pro-
woke a general labor mix-up.


The strikers are much elated to-
day over telegram from Hy Meyers,
chairman of the general executive
board Of the United Brotherhood Of
Carpenters and Joiners. He told the
strikers to stand fast and to ask for
more assistance If needed. He said
he would be here shortly and the
strikers expect him to take personal
charge Of the strike.


An attorney was consulted late
yesterday regarding the incorporation
Of the mill enterprise backed by the
strikers. The men say the mill will
be built and work will start on 1t as
soon as Incorporation papers can be
cecured
